description_long: This is a delicate necklace featuring a series of spherical beads suspended from a fine metallic chain. The beads alternate between larger, marbled brown and smaller, deep blue spheres, creating a visually striking contrast. The chain appears to be silver-toned and includes an adjustable clasp for securing around the neck. The arrangement of the beads is evenly spaced, giving the piece a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The overall design is elegant yet playful, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. The necklace's craftsmanship suggests attention to detail and a focus on both aesthetics and wearability.
description: A silver-toned necklace with alternating marbled brown and deep blue spherical beads, arranged symmetrically along a fine chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arc of the necklace with all beads clearly visible and the clasp on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the beads, with the clasp slightly more visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the chain and clasp, with the beads forming a continuous arc around the chain.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the alternating bead pattern and the gentle curve of the necklace.
